events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. The impulse line taps are reversed from correct practice — gas taps should be on top of the pipe (sloping down to drain condensate back to process) and liquid taps on the side/bottom (sloping down to avoid trapped vapor), but the installation has them backwards. This causes DP transmitter measurement error and requires rework of the piping routing before leak test/calibration, though it's correctable now since it was caught at the rough-complete stage.
